name: agent-dev
description: Develop and extend existing agents — add skills, memory systems, GitHub Issues development workflow (backlog, roadmap, groom, claim, autoplan, commit, sprint, work-loop), long-running multi-stage pipelines (add-pipeline + heartbeat / status / recover / pause / resume runtime skills), and system-aware orchestration (add-orchestrator — discover / compose / orchestrate a multi-agent system via Trinity's SystemManifest)
